top_signals.title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Jitters Spur Rally in Oil: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A flare-up in geopolitical risks drove stocks lower, bond yields rose and oil climbed as President Donald Trump said a ceasefire with Iran may be over, noting the US would probably launch further strikes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sinews of War at Sea: The Armed Services Need a Common Watercraft Family
top_signals.summary:
To sustain future maritime operations, the U.S military will need to run supplies through an environment that spans thousands of miles of open ocean, denied ports, contested straits, and archipelagic chokepoints against adversaries that have spent decades studying how to target American logistics. That problem does not require one identical vessel for every mission. It does require a more common family of watercraft for the manned ships that carry cargo and vehicles inside a theater, built for scale, interoperability, and wartime replacement. Getting this right is arguably the most important acquisition problem the joint force faces in the next decade.So

The post Sinews of War at Sea: The Armed Services Need a Common Watercraft Family appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tom Lee’s Bitmine adds $70 million worth of ETH to treasury: onchain analyst
top_signals.summary: Bitmine's most recent disclosure shows that it holds 5.74 million ETH, roughly 4.8% of Ethereum's circulating supply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The 5 types of real world assets being tokenized fastest onchain
top_signals.summary: Tokenized Real World Assets span treasuries, real estate, stocks, commodities and private credit. The sector is still small in TradFi terms but it's growing very, very fast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
